home.heroTitle: Fast deliveries in Vienna – reliable, flexible and personal.
home.heroSubtitle: Fast Transport Wien E.U. delivers parcels, documents, flowers, refrigerated goods and store pickups on time – for private and business customers across Vienna.
home.trustBar: Trusted by Vienna businesses for years

fast.title: Express-fast
fast.body: Same-day delivery in Vienna – and express within 60 minutes when you need it.

reliable.title: Reliable & insured
reliable.body: Personal handling and secure transport for every shipment.

transparent.title: Transparent pricing
transparent.body: Fixed price per address, shown clearly before you submit.

personal.title: Always reachable
personal.body: Direct line to the owner – no call center, no waiting.

reviews.quote: Top reliability, always on time and very personal service. We send all our magazines through Fast Transport Wien.
reviews.name: Media for Med Magazine Service GmbH

reviews.quote: Booked at short notice and the parcel was at the customer one hour later. Exactly what we needed.
reviews.name: Sara Köhler

reviews.quote: Quick communication, fair prices, professional service – highly recommended.
reviews.name: Markus Weber

faq.a: Standard same-day deliveries in Vienna. Express usually within 60 minutes after confirmation.

faq.q: How much does a delivery cost?
faq.a: Standard price is €25 per address incl. 20% VAT. With code FTW20 you save up to 20%.

faq.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: Invoice with IBAN bank transfer. Business customers receive a PDF invoice.

faq.q: Do you also deliver outside Vienna?
faq.a: On request we also deliver in the surrounding area. Please contact us for a custom quote.

ctaBanner.title: Ready for your first delivery?
ctaBanner.body: Place an order in less than 2 minutes – price visible immediately.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: The right solution for every transport need in Vienna.

PACKAGE.title: Parcels & shipments
PACKAGE.body: Safe transport for parcels of any size – from a letter to a large box.

FLOWERS.title: Flower delivery
FLOWERS.body: Fresh flowers delivered with care and on time – also for special occasions.

DOCUMENTS.title: Documents
DOCUMENTS.body: Confidential documents, contracts and files – hand-to-hand delivery.

MAGAZINES.title: Magazines & newspapers
MAGAZINES.body: Regular distribution of magazines and newspapers to many addresses.

STORE_PICKUP.title: Pickups from stores
STORE_PICKUP.body: We shop, pick up and deliver directly to your home or office.

EXPRESS.title: Express delivery
EXPRESS.body: Arrived in under 60 minutes – when it really has to be fast.

COOLING.title: Refrigerated transport
COOLING.body: Temperature-controlled delivery for food, medication and sensitive goods.

BUSINESS.title: Business & recurring
BUSINESS.body: Custom conditions for recurring tours and standing orders.
